title: Universe
description: Current universe ID, and IDs and descriptions of all of the universes used in a Role Playing Game.

type.description: The type of thingy the data describes, 'universesMetadata'.

schemaVersion.description: The version of the schema for the data.

currentUniverseId.description: The ID of the universe that is currently being viewed.

universesMetadata.description: The list of IDs and descriptions of the universes in the dataset.

id.description: The ID of this universe in the dataset.

description.description: The description of this universe in the dataset.
